content.en:
In the midst of a majestic mountain range, a huge vine that sprawled endlessly surrounded the void.

"This is the reincarnation of the heavenly vine!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He actually saw such a thing.

The reincarnation heavenly vine is very powerful, but the reincarnation heavenly liquid contained in the reincarnation heavenly vine helps to comprehend the original rules of the other side.

In order to improve the origin rules of the other side, he once investigated countless treasures, among which was the reincarnation heavenly liquid.

However, the Reincarnation Heavenly Liquid only appeared a few times in the land of eternity, and it was impossible to trade the Reincarnation Heavenly Liquid at all.

Unexpectedly.

There was a reincarnation vine here.

However, the strength of this reincarnation heavenly vine is very strong, and it is definitely comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he is not an opponent at all.

"You have to kill this reincarnation heavenly vine before you can take the reincarnation celestial liquid!"

But how can you kill this reincarnation vine, this is very troublesome.

Although the Reincarnation Heavenly Vine was not as good as the Overlord-level plant of the Innocent Demon Vine, even if he had several copies of his body together, he had no hope of killing it.

"Maybe we have to use the power of the reincarnation ancient snake clan!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Reincarnation Ancient Snake is very powerful, many of them are comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, if they gather more than a dozen Reincarnation Ancient Snakes and join forces together, there is hope to kill this Reincarnation Heavenly Vine.

And how to make the reincarnation ancient snake fight with the reincarnation heavenly vine, he also thought of a way.

this day.

Ye Tian found a reincarnation ancient snake that only had the late cultivation of the Origin Upper Realm, tried to befriend it, and then guided it back to the Heavenly Vine.

The reincarnation ancient snake was not very intelligent, so it was easily injured, and then followed Ye Tian to attack the reincarnation heavenly vine.

As a result, this reincarnation ancient snake was unlucky enough to die at the hands of the reincarnation heavenly vine.

After that, he attracted the weaker reincarnation ancient snake again and again, and let it fall into the hands of the reincarnation Tianteng.

Reincarnation Tianteng killed these reincarnation ancient snakes, and he didn't want Ye Tian to provoke it.

Soon, a group of reincarnation ancient snakes slaughtered the reincarnation Tianteng, and the two sides started a fight.

The strength of the Reincarnation Heavenly Vine is very strong, far surpassing the average top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, even if it is besieged by so many Reincarnation Ancient Snakes, it is still not so easy to kill.

This battle has been fought for a long time.

In the end, the reincarnation of the heavenly vine was still besieged and killed, but those reincarnation ancient snakes were also injured one after another.

The reincarnation ancient snake did not comprehend the original rules of the other side, so it did not take away the reincarnation heavenly liquid.

After these reincarnation ancient snakes left, Chen Yang immediately came over and took these reincarnation heavenly liquids away.

"Earn big!"

Ye Tian was excited.

......

Ye Tian sent the reincarnation celestial liquid to the real body to copy the body, and then used the reincarnation celestial liquid to comprehend the origin rules of the other side.

"With so much reincarnation heavenly liquid, it can definitely raise my other shore origin rules to the ninety-six-level realm, or even the ninety-seven-realm realm!"

Grunt!

Ye Tian drank a sip of the reincarnation heavenly liquid, and began to comprehend the original rules of the other side.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian immediately entered a special state, in which the efficiency of his comprehension of the Origin Rules of the Other Shore was far greater than before.

The years passed.

Ye Tian's Origin Rules on the other side have improved little by little, compared to the previous long years when it was difficult to improve, now it is very fast.

......

"The Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Origin Upper Realm has come out!"

An Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor came out of this Void Treasure Land, and after seeing the Desolate Blood Ancestor, he paid half of his resources.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor did not embarrass the other party, if the other party was killed, it would offend too many forces.

Moreover, he also wanted to get many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to come over to clean up the creatures in this Void Treasure Land for the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, so he needed these Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who were still alive to publicize it.

The Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who were able to obtain them must have obtained a lot of good things, and their publicity was more convincing than the invitation of the Ancient Heavenly Palace itself.

As for how many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors died, the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who came out would definitely not say this, after all, they didn't die!

One after another Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors came out of it, and they all withdrew, and only after they had resisted their greed, or survived by luck, did they withdraw.

But more Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors died inside, and after they fell, the resources and treasures on their bodies may still be scattered there, and the Desolate Blood Ancestor and others can send the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor to take them away in the future.

So.

Once it falls here, it will be a cheap Desolate Heavenly Palace.

this day.

The Lord of Ice and Rain also came out, and she also decided to come out after thinking about it again and again.

Subsequently.

She paid half of her resources so that she could leave the ruins of reincarnation.

"The Lord of Infinity hasn't come out yet!

The Lord of Ice Rain doesn't know the situation of the Lord of Endless, but leaving first is the most important thing to do now.

She is very satisfied with the harvest this time, and the requirements cannot be too high.

Soon.

The Lord of Ice and Rain and the rest of the Origin Realm have been sent out.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

The Lord of Ice and Rain returns.

The Lord of the Wind Fangs, the Lord of the Qin Sound, and the Lord of the Cave Mystery immediately came.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, you're finally back!"

The Lord of the Wind Teeth immediately inquired about the situation this time.

The Lord of Ice and Rain spoke of the ruins of reincarnation and the Void Treasure Land.

"That Void Treasure Land is too dangerous, it is full of creatures of the Origin Upper Realm, if I have more hole cards to save my life, otherwise I will fall soon. Moreover, I was still looking for resources on the periphery, and there were several times when I almost didn't survive. In the end, I chose to come out. "The Lord of Ice and Rain.

"What about the Endless Lord?"

The Lord of the Wind Fangs asked.

"I don't know. The Lord of Ice Rain shook his head, "He should still be in the Void Treasure Land!"

Knowing the danger of that treasure land, even though they knew that there were many treasures, the Lord of the Wind Fang had no intention of going there.

Only some top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors had the idea of going there.

......

Before you know it, 100,000 years have passed.

Ye Tian had been using the reincarnation heavenly liquid to comprehend the origin rules of the other side, and finally on this day, he raised the origin rules of the other side to the realm of ninety percent and six.

And with the breakthrough of the rules of the other side's origin, Ye Tian's other shore of the origin also skyrocketed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's other side of the origin continued to soar, and it took a long time to stabilize.

"I have refined a lot of resources that will help improve the origin of the other side, and now coupled with the breakthrough of the origin rules of the other side, the origin of the other side has skyrocketed, and now the origin of the other side is estimated to reach the level of 60 million!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And with the improvement of the Origin Rules on the other side, the skyrocketing of the Origin on the other side, and the Treasure of the Other Shore being promoted to a high level, his current strength is considered very powerful among the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

A top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor like the Lord of the Blood Night, who had just crossed the threshold, was no longer his opponent.
